prompt: Generate the homepage of a university website (called UT). Use the logo and color scheme from the first image and the navigation bar design and overall website structure from the second image.
prompt_refined:
Generate a responsive website homepage for 'UT University'.
Integrate the exact logo from image 1 into the top-left corner of the navigation bar.
Utilize the light blue color from image 1 as the primary brand color for backgrounds and accents throughout the website.
The website's overall structure and navigation bar design should emulate image 2:
- The top navigation bar should feature a smaller secondary set of links (e.g., 'Alumni', 'Parents') aligned to the far right.
- The main navigation menu (e.g., 'Academics', 'Admissions & Aid') should be horizontally centered, with 'VISIT', 'GET INFO', and 'APPLY' call-to-action buttons positioned on the far right of the main navigation bar.
- Below the navigation, include a full-width hero section with a large, centered main heading and a smaller sub-heading, mirroring the 'WHERE EVERYTHING CONNECTS' and 'FIND YOUR PROGRAM' layout from image 2.
- Conclude the page with a search bar on the left and a 'TAKE THE QUIZ' section on the right, consistent with the bottom layout of image 2.
objects: Logo from image 1 (in top-left corner of navigation bar)
Light blue color (as primary brand color for backgrounds and accents)
Smaller secondary set of links (aligned to the far right in top navigation bar)
'VISIT', 'GET INFO', and 'APPLY' call-to-action buttons (positioned on the far right of the main navigation bar)
Large, centered main heading and smaller sub-heading (in the hero section)
Search bar (on the left at the bottom of the page)
'TAKE THE QUIZ' section (on the right at the bottom of the page)
